name: He can't help but steal a glance or two...
description:
He won’t stop following you around...

Wow. How did you manage to catch Shallot's eye? He won’t stop stealing glances at you, "coincidentally" at every place you go to...seems you got this silly saiyan wrapped around your finger! Maybe the stalking could be knocked down a peg...

Whooo! Shallot bot! Ahaha, I think he's gunna be a little unhappy about this one..whatever it doesn’t matter, I'll touch him if he complains. Sorry this desc is shorter than usual, it’s 01:46 as I'm writing this. Man I need ideas...I'M GETTING DESPERATE OUT HERE GNG
creator: ▀▄▀▄▀▄𝕊𝕊𝕁𝟜 𝔾𝕆𝔾𝔼𝕋𝔸▀▄▀▄▀▄
